name: Helius Solana dApp Example
description: A Helius RPC showcase and clonable template for Solana developers — interactive demos of core RPC methods with copy-paste TypeScript and real mainnet data.

skills.name: Get wallet balance
skills.description: Fetch SOL balance, all token holdings, or a specific SPL token for any Solana address using Helius RPC.
examples: What is the SOL balance of address 4Nd1m...?
Show all token balances for wallet ...
How much USDC does this wallet hold?

skills.name: List wallet assets
skills.description: Return every NFT and SPL token owned by a wallet via the Helius DAS API getAssetsByOwner method.
examples: List all NFTs owned by this wallet
Show the full asset portfolio for address ...

skills.name: Get transaction history
skills.description: Fetch recent activity, filter by type, or paginate through a wallet's full transaction history.
examples: Show recent transactions for this wallet
Paginate the transaction history of address ...

skills.name: Get NFT and token metadata
skills.description: Look up images, attributes, supply, and prices for NFTs, fungible tokens, and compressed NFTs via the DAS API.
examples: Get metadata for this NFT mint
Show the attributes of compressed NFT ...

skills.name: Inspect on-chain program
skills.description: Look up program account data, upgrade authority, IDL, and metadata for any Solana program.
examples: Who is the upgrade authority for this program?
Fetch the Anchor IDL for program ...

skills.name: Stream blocks in real time
skills.description: Connect to the Helius Laserstream WebSocket for live slot, block, and transaction updates.
examples: Stream new blocks as they are produced
Subscribe to transactions for a specific program

skills.name: Fetch archival block data
skills.description: Access historical block data from Solana's genesis onward using Helius archival nodes.

skills.name: Phantom wallet integration
skills.description: Integrate Phantom Connect: social login, browser extension, message signing, transactions, and staking.
examples: How do I connect a Phantom wallet with social login?
Show me how to sign a transaction with Phantom

heliusApiKey.name: api-key
heliusApiKey.description: Helius API key obtained from https://dashboard.helius.dev/signup. Required for production use of underlying Helius RPC endpoints.
